changelog.title: AI Instruction Field Now Working
changelog.desc: Instructions you add before generating in the Writing Studio and content cards are now properly passed to the AI and followed.

changelog.title: Em Dashes and Markdown Removed from Output
changelog.desc: Generated content no longer contains em dashes, asterisks, pound signs, or other markdown symbols. Clean text every time.

changelog.title: This Week's Focus Now Saves Correctly
changelog.desc: Focus items now persist properly between sessions and across devices.

changelog.title: Surprise Me on the Panic Button
changelog.desc: No idea what to post? Hit Surprise Me and the Creative Director generates a random content idea AND full direction for you, no topic needed.

changelog.title: Getting Started Updated
changelog.desc: The Getting Started guide on the dashboard now includes the Swipe File and Guides so new members know they're there.
